cookie_string = 'key1=value1; key2=value2; kuaishou_key=value3'

    @staticmethod
    def parse_cookie_string(cookie_string):
        cookie = SimpleCookie()
        cookie.load(cookie_string)
        cookies_dict = {}
        cookiejar = None
        is_cn = False
